title: clinopodium nanum
intro: Clinopodium nanum, also known as small calamintha or small clinopodium, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Its medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds such as carvacrol and thymol, known for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium nanum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Clinopodium nanum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
